title.en: 1 Bedroom Condo for sale at Knightsbridge Prime Sathorn
title.zh: 1 Bedroom Condo for sale at Knightsbridge Prime Sathorn
title.th: 1 Bedroom Condo for sale at Knightsbridge Prime Sathorn

summary.th: ขาย: 1 นอน 37 ตร.ม. ราคา 5,400,000 บาท (DotProperty #6722fcbafa5c-9b6e-6862-862d-7445a089)

description.en:
📍 Prime Sathorn Location
🛏️ 1 Bedroom (Upper Floor)🛁 1 Bathroom🍳 1 Kitchen🛋️ 1 Living Room📏 37 sq.m.🏢 33rd Floor🌅 Stunning Chao Phraya River Curve View
Experience modern duplex living with soaring double-height ceilings, creating a bright and spacious atmosphere. The bedroom is located on the upper floor, offering extra privacy and a true home-like feel.
✨ Fully Furnished
✔ Stylish rose gold interior design with mirrored accents✔ Sofa Bed✔ 2 Air Conditioners✔ 55" Smart TV✔ Refrigerator✔ Microwave✔ Washing Machine
🚗 Auto Parking Available
🏊 Premium Facilities
• Infinity Swimming Pool• Fully Equipped Fitness Center• Sky Lounge• Co-working Space• Private Meeting Rooms• Rooftop Garden• 24-Hour Security & CCTV
📍 Prime Location
🚆 Close to BTS Chong Nonsi and BTS Saint Louis🏢 Minutes from Sathorn & Silom CBD🛍️ Near One Bangkok, ICONSIAM, Central Rama 3, and leading international schools☕ Surrounded by cafés, restaurants, and lifestyle destinations
